goal: Add model cost tiers (quality/balanced/budget/inherit) with per-agent model assignments for council/crank/vibe cost management

test_levels.rationale: L0 for ModelsConfig struct/merge/env resolution, L1 for ao config models command output

ag-w5c.6.1.title: Add ModelsConfig to Go config system

ag-w5c.6.3.title: Update council skill to consume model tiers

ag-w5c.6.4.title: Update crank skill with effort-to-tier mapping

ag-w5c.6.5.title: Update vibe and shared skill docs for tier support

cross_cutting_constraints: Backward-compatible: existing COUNCIL_CLAUDE_MODEL env var keeps highest priority
Council --profile flag remains valid, --tier is an alias with new naming
No omitempty on string fields that need zero-value distinction
Tests must assert behavioral correctness, not just presence
